subject: [PATCH v2 08/21] nfsd: remove premature NFS4_OO_CONFIRMED in CLAIM_PREVIOUS path

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch removes a premature setting of the NFS4_OO_CONFIRMED flag in the CLAIM_PREVIOUS path of the nfsd kernel module. The flag is set too early, causing it to remain permanently confirmed even if an open operation fails. This fix ensures that the correct success-path setter is used instead.
